name: Milford Golf Club & Resort
notes: IMPORTANT: This is the same physical property as slug 'korea-golf-club-hua-hin'. Milford Golf Club was the original name when the course opened in 1992; it is now operated as Hua Hin Korea Golf Club (since 2016). Full name history: Milford Golf Club → Milford Paradise Golf Club → The Eagle Milford Golf Club → Hua Hin Seoul Country Club → Hua Hin Korea Golf Club. Designed by Robert (Bob) McFarland. 6,614 yards, par 72. Located approximately 40 minutes / 15 km south of Hua Hin centre, near the coast nestled in mountain valleys. All fee data is for current operation under Korea Golf Club management — original Milford-era fees are not documented online. TripAdvisor listing (as of 2024) still uses 'Milford Golf Course Hua Hin' name, ranking #13 of 16 outdoor activities in Pranburi. Course conditions described as poor to average in recent years. This file is retained as a separate slug entry to support search/redirect for users searching the legacy name.
